## What and why


## The bar (check before you mark it ready)

- [ ] Focused change, one thing
- [ ] User-facing copy is em-dash-free (periods / commas / colons instead)
- [ ] I verified it actually renders, not just that it builds
- [ ] The PR description explains the why
- [ ] Linked an issue if this is non-trivial
